ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shirt_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., X-Small, Small, Medium, etc.) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Range of chest measurements for the size */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Range of neck measurements for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Range of sleeve lengths for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Range of waist measurements for the size */,
  "body_length" TEXT /* Range of body lengths for the size */,
  "shirt_type" TEXT /* Type of shirt (e.g., formal, casual) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Sizing system (e.g., US, UK, EU) */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Range of shoulder widths for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Range of hip measurements for the size */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the shirt (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the shirt is suitable (e.g., spring, summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of customer measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Customer's chest measurement */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Customer's neck measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Customer's sleeve length */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "body_length" TEXT /* Customer's body length */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Customer's hip measurement */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended shirt size based on the measurements */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "measurement_status" TEXT /* Status of the measurements (e.g., active, outdated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES shirt_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "shirt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shirt */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shirts in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shirt_id FOREIGN KEY ("shirt_id") REFERENCES shirt_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "shirt_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shirt */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shirts sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shirt_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shirt_id FOREIGN KEY ("shirt_id") REFERENCES shirt_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_popularity" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales for the size */,
  "average_sales_per_month" TEXT /* Average number of sales per month for the size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the popularity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)
